yourUsecase.title: Your Agent
yourUsecase.description: Short description of what this agent does
yourUsecase.promptPlaceholder: Describe your goals, requirements, and any relevant details...
yourUsecase.contextPlaceholder: Specify any useful information (competitive context, specific stakes...)

starter.title: Welcome to your Elio scaffold
starter.description: Build your first AgentApp from your product.md.
starter.subIntro: Drop your product.md to kick off the specification with the PM.
starter.cleanupHint: Once your app is built, ask the Replit AI: "Remove the starter page" to clean up.

product.title: I have a product.md
product.desc: Produced by the Value Office AgentApp. The PM uses it to iterate a backlog with you before the Builder runs.

valueOffice.title: No product.md yet?
valueOffice.desc: Start with the Value Office AgentApp — it helps you turn your use case into a product.md ready to vibe-code here.

upload.productStepHint: The file produced by Value Office. It will be placed at the project root.
upload.prototypeStepHint: A Google AI Studio prototype helps the PM align on the expected look & feel. Leave empty if you don't have one.
upload.thenStep: 3. Launch the specification with the PM
